mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, product_id, buyer_id, seller_id, price, status) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{productId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{price}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, p.id AS p_id, p.title AS p_title, p.price AS p_price, p.image AS p_image, u.username AS p_username, b.id AS b_id, b.username AS b_username FROM orders o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user b ON o.buyer_id = b.id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT o.*, p.id AS p_id, p.title AS p_title, p.price AS p_price, p.image AS p_image, u.username AS p_username, b.id AS b_id, b.username AS b_username FROM orders o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user b ON o.buyer_id = b.id WHERE o.buyer_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.*, p.id AS p_id, p.title AS p_title, p.price AS p_price, p.image AS p_image, u.username AS p_username, b.id AS b_id, b.username AS b_username FROM orders o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user b ON o.buyer_id = b.id WHERE o.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.*, p.id AS p_id, p.title AS p_title, p.price AS p_price, p.image AS p_image, u.username AS p_username, b.id AS b_id, b.username AS b_username FROM orders o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN user b ON o.buyer_id = b.id
o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(price), 0) FROM orders WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND status = 3
